LAW AND MOTION, 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING (FOR TENTATIVE RULING PURPOSES ONLY, PART 3 OF 3), OFF CALENDAR DUPLICATE ENTRY.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HOPE OF THE HAIGHT, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO ESTABLISH A LIKELIHOOD OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS OF ITS CLAIMS FOR FRAUD, BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY, AND CONVERSION AGAINST DEFENDANT MIKE KAZZOUH. THE BOND PREVIOUSLY POSTED BY MR. KAZZOUH IS EXONERATED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order Hearing (For Tentative Ruling Purposess Only Part 2 Of 3)
Off Calendar Jan-24-2019 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order Hearing (For Tentative Ruling Purposes Only, Part 3 Of 3)
Off Calendar Jan-24-2019 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order Hearing.

Plaintiff Hope of the Haight, Inc.'s application for a preliminary injunction is denied. Plaintiff has failed to establish a likelihood of prevailing on the merits of its claims for fraud, breach of fiduciary duty, and conversion against defendant Mike Kazzouh. The bond previously posted by Mr. Kazzouh is exonerated. (see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for Defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
